urgency_summary: Use spinach and mushrooms today — spinach is wilting and both will deteriorate quickly without freezing.

recipes.title: Wilted Spinach & Mushroom Stir-Fry
recipes.rescue_reason: Spinach appears to be wilting — if it still smells fresh, use it immediately in high heat cooking
steps: Heat 2 tbsp oil in a wok or large pan over high heat
Add sliced mushrooms, cook 3-4 min until golden
Add spinach, toss quickly until just wilted (1-2 min)
Season with soy sauce, salt and pepper

recipes.title: Spinach & Mushroom Omelette
recipes.rescue_reason: Uses remaining spinach — gentle cooking preserves what's left of the texture
steps: Cook on medium heat, fold when edges set

storage_tips: Carrots can be stored in a sealed bag in the fridge for up to 2 weeks
If mushrooms develop sliminess, discard immediately
